query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  slug,
  featured,
  displayOrder,
  faq
FROM island_guides
WHERE featured = 1
ORDER BY displayOrder ASC
LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  slug,
  featured,
  displayOrder,
  faq
FROM island_guides
WHERE featured = 1
ORDER BY displayOrder ASC
LIMIT 20
